---
title: "Join us"
---

We are always interested in hearing from motivated people. Replace this intro
with a sentence about the lab's mentoring style and environment.

## Open positions

*No funded openings at the moment.* When there are, list them here with a link
to the official posting.

## PhD students

What you look for in applicants, funding routes, and how to get in touch
(e.g. email with CV, transcripts, and a short statement of interest).

## Postdocs

Note relevant fellowship programs (e.g. Marie Skłodowska-Curie, national
fellowships) and invite informal inquiries.

## BSc/MSc theses & internships

Which topics are available, prerequisites, and who to contact.
